positive: A stylized, maximalist jungle scene featuring a neon hummingbird hovering above exotic, oversized tropical flowers and lush, vibrant foliage. The composition should be highly centralized and symmetrically balanced, optimized for apparel placement. Use a vibrant color palette dominated by emerald green, royal purple, hot pink, and electric turquoise. The style should be a seamless geometric pop-art inspired digital illustration, featuring clean, crisp lines, defined silhouettes, and strong contrast. The lighting should be dramatic and glowing, simulating bioluminescence. Vector art quality, perfect for direct-to-garment printing.
negative: blur, low detail, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, dirty background, imperfect, bad anatomy, extra limbs, grainy, realistic photography, logos, trademarks
